report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides — FHE Crypto Guide 2026 and AI Agent Payments x402 Guide — with full SEO optimization, structured data, and PUBLISH_QUEUE addition.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE): Zama ($1B+ unicorn, mainnet Dec 2025), Fhenix ($22M raised, CoFHE on Base), Inco Network ($4.5M), COTI dark pools. ~20 TPS current, 1000+ TPS target 2026. Key use cases: confidential DeFi, dark pools, blind auctions, private governance.

AI Agent Payments & x402 Protocol: Coinbase x402 revives HTTP 402 for autonomous agent payments. 75M+ transactions processed, $24M+ volume. ERC-8004 on-chain agent identity live Jan 2026. Coinbase Agentic Wallets launched Feb 2026. Supported by Cloudflare, Google, Vercel, Stripe. Competing standards: ACP, UCP, Google AP2.

sections.title: Content Created
items: FHE Crypto Guide 2026 (~3200 words): Covers FHE fundamentals, FHE vs ZK vs TEEs comparison, key projects (Zama/Fhenix/Inco/COTI), DeFi use cases, technical challenges, risks, 2026 privacy narrative context, 6-question FAQ

AI Agent Payments x402 Guide (~3200 words): Covers agent payment infrastructure, x402 protocol mechanics, protocol comparison table, ERC-8004 identity standard, Coinbase Agentic Wallets, real-world use cases, agent economy vision, risks, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: FHE page: title 'FHE Crypto Guide 2026: Fully Homomorphic Encryption Explained | degen0x', 10 keywords, OpenGraph article type, Twitter summary_large_image, ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 questions), 6 internal links

x402 page: title 'x402 Protocol & AI Agent Payments Guide 2026: How Agents Pay On-Chain | degen0x', 10 keywords, OpenGraph article type, Twitter summary_large_image, ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 questions), 6 internal links
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No new client components needed — both are static educational guides with embedded data visualizations (comparison tables, project cards, flow diagrams) in JSX
